/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/rtcli.dir/rtcli/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtcli.dir/rtcli/src/command_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtcli.dir/rtcli/src/scheduler_commands.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtcli.dir/rtcli/src/record_commands.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtcli.dir/rtcli/src/task_commands.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtcli.dir/rtcli/src/data_commands.cpp.o -o ../../../tools/rtcli  -lrt ../rtfw-connect/librtfw-connect.a -lpthread -lrt ../rtfw-common/librtfw-common.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0
